data.body: SDET REVIEW ROUND 2 (closing gate) — opus, verified against actual code not just claims. All round-1 CRITICAL (C1 link dedup CI coverage, C2 duplicate-on-retry, C3 tautological echo test, C4 fork tie-break) and IMPORTANT (I1 inbound real-store, I2/I3 shared concurrency identity, I4 forward-compat payload, I5/I6/I7 isolation/brittleness) findings RESOLVED. d843 subprocess-reap tests judged robust (real grandchild-holding-pipe reap, AcliTimeoutError-not-TimeoutError guard, read/write classification). Independent scan found NO new important/critical issues (signing/apply/concurrency/parity all assert observable behavior). Sanity run green (broad 1812). Non-blocking: bug 8874 (reducer UUID-vs-filename tie-break doc mismatch; clones still converge) tracked separately. VERDICT: ZERO important/critical findings remain — gate PASSES. The SDET loop is complete.
